adjudication.method: Synthetic authority-profile cases covering the v0.4 baseline and conditional source-authority rows.

cases.package_text: Environmental Assessment under the National Environmental Policy Act and NEPA. This fixture intentionally includes every baseline and conditional authority trigger used by the v0.4 rule pack. National Environmental Policy Act applies: National Environmental Policy Act; NEPA; environmental assessment. NEPA section 4332 environmental information is addressed: environmental effects; alternatives; consultation; public comment. NEPA level of review is supported: environmental assessment; finding of no significant impact; significant effects. NEPA timing and unified-review duties are addressed: schedule; page limit; unified review; objection period; publicly circulated. 7 CFR part 1b - National Environment Policy Act is reviewed: 7 CFR part 1b; NEPA procedures; environmental assessment. 7 CFR § 1b.1 - Purpose is reviewed: decision-making; coordinated; predictable; timely review. 7 CFR § 1b.2 - Policy is reviewed: major Federal action; discretion; significance; project at hand. USDA EA requirements are met: purpose and need; alternatives; affected environment; environmental effects; environmental consequences. USDA FONSI support is traceable: finding of no significant impact; FONSI; decision notice; mitigation. Efficient and integrated environmental review is documented: consultation; coordination; environmental review; integrated. 7 CFR § 1b.11 - Definitions and acronyms is reviewed: definitions; acronyms; terminology; NEPA. USDA final rule: National Environmental Policy Act, 91 FR 17092, Apr. 3, 2026 is reviewed: 7 CFR part 1b; effective date; USDA final rule; NEPA. Forest Service Environmental Planning / NEPA page is reviewed: Forest Service; NEPA; USDA NEPA rule; 36 CFR part 220. Seven County Infrastructure Coalition v. Eagle County, Supreme Court opinion is reviewed: reasonably foreseeable effects; project at hand; agency discretion; NEPA. Administrative Procedure Act final agency action, 5 U.S.C. § 704 is reviewed: final agency action; decision notice; FONSI; authorization. NFMA forest-plan consistency is addressed: National Forest Management Act; Land Management Plan; Forest Plan; plan consistency. 36 CFR part 219 - Planning is reviewed: 36 CFR part 219; planning; plan components; project consistency. 36 CFR 219.15 project consistency is addressed: 36 CFR 219.15; Land Management Plan; Forest Plan; plan consistency. 36 CFR part 218 - Project-level predecisional administrative review is reviewed: 36 CFR part 218; objection; legal notice; decision notice. Forest Service National Directives portal is reviewed: Forest Service directives; manual; handbook; current directives. Forest Service Region 1 field directives index is reviewed: Region 1 directives; regional supplement; field directives; current directives. FSM 2670 - Threatened, Endangered and Sensitive Plants and Animals is reviewed: FSM 2670; threatened; endangered; sensitive species; biological evaluation. Multiple-Use Sustained-Yield Act, 16 U.S.C. §§ 528-531 is reviewed: multiple use; sustained yield; outdoor recreation; watershed; wildlife. Organic Administration Act, 16 U.S.C. § 475 is reviewed: watershed; timber; national forest purposes. Organic Administration Act, 16 U.S.C. § 551 is reviewed: occupancy; use; protection; national forests. Northern Region species of conservation concern page is reviewed: species of conservation concern; Regional Forester; sensitive species; forest plan. 42 U.S.C. § 4336b - Programmatic environmental documents is reviewed: tiers to; incorporates by reference; programmatic; final environmental impact statement. 42 U.S.C. § 4336c - Adoption of categorical exclusions is reviewed: categorical exclusion; adopted CE; categorical exclusion path. 42 U.S.C. § 4336f - Sponsor-prepared environmental documents is reviewed: sponsor; applicant; financial interest; agency responsibility. 7 CFR § 1b.3 - Categorical exclusions and FANEC is reviewed: CE/FANEC screen; categorical exclusion path; extraordinary circumstances review; FANEC. 7 CFR § 1b.4 - USDA subcomponent categorical exclusions is reviewed: subcomponent categorical exclusion; USDA CE screening; extraordinary circumstances review; USDA CE. 7 CFR § 1b.10 - Documentation prepared by applicant or third party is reviewed: applicant; third party; independent evaluation; financial disclosure. 36 CFR part 214 - Postdecisional administrative review for written instruments is reviewed: 36 CFR part 214; appeal; written authorization; effective date. 36 CFR part 216 - Notice and comment for Forest Service directives is reviewed: 36 CFR part 216; directives; notice and comment; standards; directive. 2022 Custer Gallatin Land Management Plan is applied: Custer Gallatin; 2022 Land Management Plan; Custer Gallatin National Forest Land Management Plan; Land Management Plan. Endangered Species Act section 7 consultation is addressed: Endangered Species Act; Section 7; threatened; endangered; biological assessment. ESA consultation regulations are addressed: Endangered Species Act; Section 7; biological assessment; Fish and Wildlife Service; U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service. NHPA section 106 compliance is addressed: National Historic Preservation Act; Section 106; SHPO; cultural resources; historic properties. 36 CFR part 800 consultation process is addressed: 36 CFR part 800; Section 106; SHPO; adverse effect; historic properties. Montana SHPO review is addressed: Montana SHPO; State Historic Preservation Officer; SHPO; cultural resources; cultural resource. Roadless Rule compliance is addressed: Roadless Rule; inventoried roadless; roadless area; roadless characteristics; Inventoried Roadless Area. Executive Order 11990 wetlands protection is addressed: Executive Order 11990; wetlands; wetland; mitigation; floodplains. Migratory Bird Treaty Act compliance is addressed: Migratory Bird Treaty Act; migratory bird; birds; conservation measures; Executive Order 13186. Executive Order 13186 migratory-bird responsibilities are addressed: Executive Order 13186; migratory bird; Migratory Bird Treaty Act.
